creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
I'm not sure I see the issue here?  Can you elaborate?

The plugin check_ssh is used to check the availability of an SSH  
service and check_by_ssh is used in a way similar to NRPE in that it  
calls a process on a remote server via SSH.  In addition to this,  
libexec/nagios/check_ssh is currently listed in the ports pkg-plist  
file (line 56).

Jarrod.
(net-mgmt/nagios-plugins maintainer)
